title: Bakeros elatum
taxonomy: Bakeros elatum is classified as a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Aizoaceae. Within this family, it is a member of the subfamily Ruschioideae. More specifically, Bakeros elatum is placed in the genus Bakeros. It is native to South Africa.
uses: Bakeros elatum, also known as Baker's sedge, has been found to have potential medicinal properties. The plant's extracts have been studied for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects.
